CandidateMotifs.name: Inverse Escalation Dynamics
CandidateMotifs.minimal_topology: binary contested hubs with negative-feedback edge weights

AdversarialHypotheses.H1: Sudden reduction in path distance (vacuum) forces an irreversible compression funnel regardless of prior diffusion state.
AdversarialHypotheses.H2: The funnel is an artifact of the central hub's degree; a vacuum event on a low-degree node will fail to force compression.
AdversarialHypotheses.falsifier: A vacuum event on a node with degree < 3 fails to break a high-entropy diffusion field.

AdversarialHypotheses.H1: Boundary reflection geometrically self-sustains diffusion longer than direct central injection.
AdversarialHypotheses.H2: Reflection persistence is merely an artifact of delayed memory decay.
AdversarialHypotheses.falsifier: Direct injection with equivalent delay parameters achieves identical diffusion persistence as reflected injection.

AdversarialHypotheses.H1: A high-weight structural motif survives infinite topological noise if the noise is restricted to peripheral leaf nodes.
AdversarialHypotheses.H2: Survival is just an artifact of total graph volume; noise eventually overrides any core motif.
AdversarialHypotheses.falsifier: Continuous peripheral noise eventually alters the decision regime of the core triad.

AdversarialHypotheses.H1: Increasing pressure (latency/friction) on a node causes a geometric snap-reversal in dominance once a threshold is breached.
AdversarialHypotheses.H2: Escalation is purely linear and symmetric; snap-reversals are artifacts of observer measurement loops.
AdversarialHypotheses.falsifier: The node smoothly degrades linearly without a sudden compensatory geometric cascade.

ExperimentBatch.explicit_falsifier: Boundary bounce decays faster than direct hub injection.
Core motif shatters and realigns to match leaf noise.
System decays linearly without a snap-reversal.

RegimePredictions.Topological Compression: Forces transition from DIFFUSION_FIELD to COMPRESSION_FUNNEL.
RegimePredictions.Motif Basins: Locks system into an inescapable RESONANCE_BASIN.
RegimePredictions.Inverse Escalation: Triggers sudden shift from INDECISION_PLATEAU to COMPRESSION_FUNNEL.

CrossDomainInterpretations.network_cascades: Vacuum mechanics map to artificial centralities forcing viral cascades.
CrossDomainInterpretations.signal_propagation: Reflected loops map to waveguide echoes sustaining signal without power drain.
CrossDomainInterpretations.decision_systems: Motif basins map to cognitive biases surviving noisy contradictory evidence.
CrossDomainInterpretations.game_state_transitions: Inverse escalation maps to comeback mechanics forcing an absorbing state.
CrossDomainInterpretations.musical_structures: All motifs map to tempo/tension structures: buildups (escalation), drops (compression), loops (reflection).

PotentialDiscoveries.experiment_focus: Inject two opposing reflection loops in a symmetric ring to see if they cancel into dead space or lock into a permanent binary oscillation.
Trigger a topological vacuum, then instantly sever the target node. See if the geometric momentum sustains the compression on an empty coordinate.
Connect three motif-stable basins and apply inverse escalation pressure to the bridges between them. Hunt for a synchronized breathing state.
